text.title: dora-metrics Failure Modes
text.summary: Migrated antipatterns for dora-metrics as failure modes. Add detector + repair clauses where missing.

failure-mode.description: "Deployment" definition is the swamp: deploys to prod-like staging? Feature flag rollouts? Per-service or per-monorepo?
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Without a written, agent-readable definition, every team measures something different.

failure-mode.description: Lead Time conflates "commit to merge" + "merge to deploy" + "deploy to release"; agents collapse them and miss the actual bottleneck.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Measure merge-to-deploy specifically, not from commit.

failure-mode.description: Change Failure Rate depends on incident classification — many "rollbacks" are routine config changes, many incidents aren't tied to a deploy.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Agents inflate or deflate CFR depending on the incident-system schema.

failure-mode.description: MTTR includes detection time + response time + recovery time; agents compute from incident.opened_at → resolved_at and miss the silent half-hour before alert fires.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Use incident detection time, not created time.

failure-mode.description: 2025 research: AI-assistant adoption correlates with -1.5% throughput, -7.2% stability — likely because AI encourages larger batches.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Agents must track batch size or DORA improvements are illusory.

failure-mode.description: Vendor-tool dashboards (Sleuth/LinearB/Jellyfish) have opinionated definitions that may not match yours; agents take their numbers at face value.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening

failure-mode.description: Elite-vs-Low buckets feel motivating but encourage gaming (artificial micro-deploys to bump frequency).
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening

failure-mode.description: "Reliability" as the fifth metric is not yet standardized — implementations vary; agents should expose error budget burn or SLO attainment, not invent their own.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Use SLO attainment as the reliable proxy.

failure-mode.description: LLMs invent thresholds ("Elite means daily deploys") — anchor every claim to a citation; the official thresholds change yearly in the State of DevOps report.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening

failure-mode.description: Lead-time computation often pulls pr.created_at instead of pr.merged_at; this inflates lead time and hides queue-after-merge time.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Use merge timestamp, not creation timestamp.

failure-mode.description: Agents include hotfix deploys when computing Deployment Frequency (good) but exclude them from Change Failure Rate (wrong) because they don't open an incident — fix the schema, not the calc.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Include hotfixes in all metrics consistently.

failure-mode.description: Multi-service repos: agents attribute deploys to the wrong service when the deploy event lacks a service label.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Force the deploy event to carry {service, sha, env, success}.

failure-mode.description: AI-coauthored PRs are detectable via co-author trailer or commit-message tags; agents skip the signal and miss the AI-impact dimension.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Expose AI adoption signal in reports.

failure-mode.description: "Time-zone aware" matters: deploy at 23:00 UTC vs 06:00 UTC affects Deployment Frequency buckets at month boundaries; pick UTC and stay there.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening

failure-mode.description: Agents recompute history retroactively after a definition tweak — breaks trust.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Version the definitions and freeze old data; show "definition v2 from 2026-01-15".
